case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MICHAEL STCLAIR et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STCLAIR, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-22-2013
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-27-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STCLAIR, MICHAEL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2013 CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-13-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STCLAIR, MICHAEL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2013 CONTINUED TO FEB-25-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $361.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT STCLAIR, MICHAEL
DECLARATION  OF SARAH A. ROBINSON-MCELROY FILED RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION DENISE CONDON FILED RE: CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STCLAIR, MICHAEL $4,337.34 PRINCIPAL, $2,145.00 INTEREST, $361.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,843.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
